name: Halloween Memory: Reborn
short_description: Halloween Memory: Reborn – is a Memory game. Match all the identical cards before time runs out! This game has 14 levels with a gradually increasing degree of complexity.Play, train your memory, and earn points.Compete with your friends who will score more
detailed_description:
Halloween Memory: Reborn – is a Memory game.
Match all the identical cards before time runs out!
This game has 14 levels with a gradually increasing degree of complexity.

Play, train your memory, and earn points.
Compete with your friends who will score more

The game contains:
- Nice graphics
- Good background music
- 14 levels
- Halloween theme
